englishDefinitions: To be selected for the main school sports team, usually at a high school or college.
persianTranslation: به تیم اصلی مدرسه/دانشگاه راه پیدا کردن
examples: She trained hard all summer to make varsity.
Only the best players make varsity in our school.
He was proud to make varsity as a freshman.
synonyms: Be selected for the varsity team
